trades.reasoning: Perfect 100-score with all four multi-signal confirmation criteria met — RSI in bullish zone (65.7), MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, price well above SMA-20, and a volume surge indicating institutional participation on a risk-on day.

decisions.briefing: Markets are in risk-on mode with NASDAQ up 1.3% and S&P 500 up 0.8%, providing a clear signal to deploy the remaining $677 in cash. CHRN is the standout candidate with a perfect 100 score and all four confirmation signals aligned — the strongest technical setup in the screener. Existing positions (QQQ, EAT, OLED, WT, ROAD, INOD) remain in bullish territory with no exit signals, so we hold and let profit targets and stop-losses manage them.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly today with the NASDAQ gaining 1.3% and the S&P 500 up 0.8%, driven by continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending and resilient corporate earnings expectations heading into Q2 reporting season. Technology and semiconductor names led the session, with investors rotating into higher-beta growth stocks as risk appetite improved. No major macro headwinds emerged to challenge the bullish tone, leaving momentum-driven strategies in a favorable position.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日普遍上漲，納斯達克指數漲幅達1.3%，標普500亦上升0.8%，主要受人工智能基礎建設支出持續擴大及企業盈利預期穩健所帶動。科技股與半導體類股領漲，投資者在市場風險偏好提升的背景下積極買入高貝塔成長股。宏觀面未見明顯利空，整體動能策略仍處於有利環境。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Technical confluence occurs when multiple independent indicators all point in the same direction at the same time — such as a bullish MACD crossover, an RSI in the momentum zone, price above its moving average, and a volume surge all appearing together. When signals converge like this, it suggests broad agreement among different types of market participants (trend followers, momentum traders, volume-based algorithms), making the setup higher-probability than any single signal alone. CHRN today is a textbook example: all four criteria aligned, earning it a perfect score.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 技術共振（Technical Confluence）是指多個獨立的技術指標同時指向同一方向，例如MACD看漲交叉、RSI處於動能區間、價格位於均線上方，以及成交量放大同步出現。當多個信號共振時，代表趨勢追蹤者、動能交易者和量化策略等不同市場參與者達成共識，其勝率遠高於單一指標的參考價值。今日CHRN正是典型案例：四大確認條件齊備，獲得滿分評級。
